source_old_req: The Ping_Spg subprogram component must assume that the Data_Sink parameter carries payload data of type Simple_Type that is greater than or equal to 0. This assumption ensures that invalid or out-of-range data cannot cause crashes in the underlying C language code during deserialization or memory operations.
natural_requirement: The Q component shall define the implementation-level data routing and execution constraints for Q.Impl. In the implementation layer, Q.Impl shall route the data flow from Data_Sink to Q_Spg.Data_Sink through P1. The implementation shall use the Sporadic dispatch protocol, execute with a period of 10 Ms, meet a deadline of 10 Ms, and run at priority 1.

requirement_items.text: The Q.Impl implementation shall route the data flow from Data_Sink to Q_Spg.Data_Sink through connection P1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Q.Impl implementation shall declare connection P1 from Data_Sink to Q_Spg.Data_Sink.

requirement_items.text: The Q.Impl implementation shall execute using the Sporadic dispatch protocol.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Q.Impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Sporadic.

requirement_items.text: The Q.Impl implementation shall execute with a period of 10 Ms.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Q.Impl implementation shall assign Period as 10 Ms.

requirement_items.text: The Q.Impl implementation shall meet a deadline of 10 Ms.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Q.Impl implementation shall assign deadline as 10 Ms.

requirement_items.text: The Q.Impl implementation shall run at priority 1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Q.Impl implementation shall assign Priority as 1.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The Q.Impl implementation shall declare connection P1 from Data_Sink to Q_Spg.Data_Sink. The Q.Impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Sporadic. The Q.Impl implementation shall assign Period as 10 Ms. The Q.Impl implementation shall assign deadline as 10 Ms. The Q.Impl implementation shall assign Priority as 1.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The Q.Impl implementation shall route the data flow from Data_Sink to Q_Spg.Data_Sink through connection P1. The Q.Impl implementation shall execute using the Sporadic dispatch protocol. The Q.Impl implementation shall execute with a period of 10 Ms. The Q.Impl implementation shall meet a deadline of 10 Ms. The Q.Impl implementation shall run at priority 1.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
